2604.21632.title: To See the Unseen: on the Generalization Ability of Transformers in Symbolic Reasoning
2604.21632.paper_summary: We investigate the ability of decoder-only transformer models to perform abstract symbolic reasoning; specifically solving propositional logic reasoning problems given in-context. Previous work demonstrated that models fail to generalize to problems involving variable names that were not observed during training, and it was shown that one reason behind this is the difficulty of copying (or generating) unseen tokens. We show both theoretically and empirically that a particular representational collapse also has a crucial role: the unembeddings (last-layer weights) of unseen tokens collapse to nearly the same vector during training. The collapse makes distinguishing multiple unseen variables difficult for the model (especially when the embedding and unembedding parameters are shared), and provides a mechanistic explanation for the effectiveness of existing heuristic interventions like "active forgetting", which periodically reset the token (un)embeddings. Based on these observations, we devise a combination of techniques, involving a small architecture change facilitating copying, data diversity, and freezing or resetting (un)embeddings, that achieves generalization to unseen tokens. We support our claims with extensive controlled experiments on propositional logic reasoning problems. Beyond synthetic experiments, we also observe evidence of (un)embedding collapse in the open-weight models in the Gemma 3 family, which includes 99 unused tokens reserved for downstream use. Empirically we find that the correlated embeddings of these tokens are a poor initialization for finetuning applications.
2604.21632.paper_summary_zh: 我們調查了僅解碼器的Transformer模型在進行抽象符號推理方面的能力；具體而言，解決上下文中給出的命題邏輯推理問題。先前的研究表明，模型無法對訓練期間未觀察到的變量名稱的問題進行泛化，並且顯示出其背後的一個原因是複製（或生成）未見標記的難度。我們理論上和實證上都顯示，特定的表徵崩潰也扮演著關鍵角色：未見標記的去嵌入（最後一層權重）在訓練過程中崩潰為幾乎相同的向量。這種崩潰使模型難以區分多個未見變量（尤其是當嵌入和去嵌入參數共享時），並為現有啟發式干預措施的有效性提供了機械解釋，例如「主動遺忘」，該措施定期重置標記的（去）嵌入。基於這些觀察，我們設計了一組技術組合，涉及小型架構變更以促進複製、數據多樣性，以及凍結或重置（去）嵌入，從而實現對未見標記的泛化。我們用大量控制實驗支持我們的主張，這些實驗針對命題邏輯推理問題。除了合成實驗，我們還觀察到Gemma 3系列中的開放權重模型中存在（去）嵌入崩潰的證據，其中包括99個保留用於下游使用的未使用標記。我們實證發現，這些標記的相關嵌入對於微調應用來說是一個不佳的初始化。
2604.21632.author: Nevena Lazić et.al.
2604.21632.authors: Nevena Lazić, Liam Fowl, András György, Csaba Szepesvári
